skills.name: Production Proposal
skills.description: Draft production-level segment and scene-moment proposals as local review patches.
skills.outputContract: Reply with draftId, projectId, productionId, draft status, last preview_apply ok/stage, and counts for segments and scene moments.

skills.name: Dual Orchestration
skills.description: Coordinate project and production proposal drafts in a two-stage review flow.
skills.outputContract: Return both draft ids, preview status for each, and a short dependency note showing how production references the project proposal.

skills.name: Asset Proposal
skills.description: Draft reviewable asset candidate plans before media generation.
skills.outputContract: Return draftId, asset slot or selected target when known, candidate count, unresolved risks, and review status.

skills.name: Content Unit Proposal
skills.description: Draft content-unit structure proposals as local review patches.
skills.outputContract: Return draftId, productionId when known, content unit count, preview status, and structural gaps.

skills.name: Content Unit Media Proposal
skills.description: Draft media and keyframe plans for existing content units.
skills.outputContract: Return draftId, content unit targets, planned media/keyframe count, preview status, and open decisions.

skills.name: Script Split
skills.description: Draft line-number-based script split proposals for review.
skills.outputContract: Return draftId, source title, episode or production count, preview status, warnings, and confidence.

skills.name: Setting Prep
skills.description: Prepare or improve one selected creative reference.
skills.instructionTemplate: Goal: improve a selected creative reference or identify the minimum missing facts needed to make it production-ready. Use current context and ask the user only when the selected target is ambiguous.
skills.outputContract: Return the improvement suggestion, missing data points, and whether a proposal draft is needed next.
